title: Zebkit zbk-color Token Overrides
description: Authorable overrides for the zbk-color token module.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

scale.description: Fluid-scale controls for this module (e.g. min-viewport/max-viewport/min-base/max-base/min-ratio/max-ratio on font-size, max-scale on spacing).

black.description: Global near-black for maximum-contrast ink on any canvas.

white.description: Global near-white for maximum-contrast canvas surfaces.

transparent.description: Fully transparent color for surfaces that must not paint.

global-black.description: Global near-black for maximum-contrast ink on any canvas.

global-white.description: Global near-white for maximum-contrast canvas surfaces.

global-transparent.description: Fully transparent color for surfaces that must not paint.
